articles.author: Menelaos Hadjicostis, Renata Brito, Sam McNeil
articles.title: What to know about the EU’s new rules on migration and asylum as they come into effect - AP News
articles.description: The European Union is set to implement a new set of rules governing how each of its 27 member states will deal with irregular migration and asylum seekers. The European Migration and Asylum Pact is the culmination of years of grueling negotiations that overha…
articles.content:
BRUSSELS (AP) The European Union is set to implement a new set of rules Friday governing how each of its 27 member states will deal with irregular migration and asylum seekers.
